name: VT Enrich Hash
description: Enrich a file hash (MD5/SHA1/SHA256) via VirusTotal v3 API. Returns a curated verdict, detection score, list of malicious vendors, and a permalink.

hash.description: The file hash to look up (MD5, SHA1, or SHA256)

malicious_vendors.description: List of antivirus vendors that flagged the hash as malicious

permalink.description: Link to the VirusTotal GUI report for this hash

outputs.malicious: At least one antivirus vendor flagged the hash as malicious
outputs.undetected: VirusTotal knows the hash but no vendor flagged it
outputs.unknown: VirusTotal has never seen this hash
